title: Critical Path Not Showing
excerpt: I’ve set up a detailed template and created boards using this template. When I go to the Gantt view and in the view settings select “Show Critical Path,” all of the items go grey - non are highlighted red. I have depende…

posts.author: MaddyMackinFreeman (Maddy Mackin Freeman)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve set up a detailed template and created boards using this template. When I go to the Gantt view and in the view settings select “Show Critical Path,” all of the items go grey - non are highlighted red. I have dependencies and timelines assigned for each item.

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Maddy! Do you happen to be using the “Baseline” feature as well in this widget?

Screenshot 2024-08-20 at 2.35.57 PM1188×620 50.4 KB

If Baseline is enabled for the widget, the Critical Path won’t display. If you’re not using this feature, I know you mentioned that your items have dependencies. Can you confirm if the item on your board that has the latest end date has any items that are dependent on it?

posts.author: MaddyMackinFreeman (Maddy Mackin Freeman)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Malia, thanks so much for your response! I do have a couple of baselines captured, but have turned them off when I turn on the Critical Path. Are the two functions mutually exclusive?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes! The Critical Path will not appear if Baseline is shown. To confirm, if you hide the Baseline, does the Critical Path appear?

Screenshot 2024-08-21 at 2.14.19 PM438×569 28.1 KB
